thankyou.title: You're In.
thankyou.text: Check your inbox. Your Riverside join link arrives within minutes. We will send a reminder before the live session on June 17 at 11:00 AM Eastern.

data.eyebrow: Live Workshop | June 17 at 11:00 AM ET
data.title: AI-Written, Human-Reviewed. The Email Audit Workshop.
paragraphs: Email programs leave revenue on the table. Subject lines stall. Automations never get finished. Lifecycle stops at welcome.

Bring your last 3 campaigns. Brent Peterson and a Mailchimp partner expert walk through 5 audit gaps live. Forty-five minutes of working time. Every registrant leaves with a free audit delivered within 7 days.

data.alt: The Email Audit Workshop with Content Cucumber and Mailchimp on June 17

data.title: The Email Gaps Hiding in Plain Sight
data.subtitle: Three out of five commerce SMBs have at least four of these gaps. The data already lives in your dashboard.

items.title: Subject Lines That Get Ignored
items.text: Average open rates sit around 21%. Subject lines are the first leak. AI rewrites them quickly. Humans reviewing the AI catch the brand voice issues AI misses.

items.title: Segments You Built and Forgot
items.text: Your list grew. Your segments did not. New buyers, return buyers, lapsed buyers, browsers, all receiving the same email. Same offer. Same result.

items.title: Automations Half-Built or Never Built
items.text: Welcome series ends after email 2. No abandoned cart. No post-purchase. No win-back. The infrastructure is in Mailchimp. The work is finishing it.

items.title: Lifecycle That Stops at Onboarding
items.text: First week is dialed. Day 30, 60, 90 is silence. Customer lifetime value drops because the journey ends after the first purchase.

items.title: Email That AI Agents Cannot Read
items.text: Plain-text and structured content rules reach beyond inboxes. AI agents and email clients render structure, not images. Image-heavy and structure-poor email disappears in both.

data.title: Stop Reacting. Start Auditing.
paragraphs: Email programs grow in fragments. A new automation here, a campaign there, a subject line tweak when open rates drop. That is reacting, not auditing.
The audit workshop walks you through 5 gaps live, on a real anonymized account. You bring your campaigns. We bring the framework. Mailchimp brings the tooling fit.

old_way.heading: Reacting (What Happens Now)
items: Tweak subject lines when open rates drop
Build segments once and let them age
Set up a welcome series and call it a journey
Send the same monthly newsletter to every list
Hope for revenue at month end

new_way.heading: Auditing (What You'll Build)
items: Subject lines reviewed by both AI and humans
Segments rebuilt from current behavior data
Lifecycle automations that go beyond the first week
Content AI agents and email clients both render
A 5-gap audit framework you can rerun every quarter

data.title: What You'll Walk Away With
data.subtitle: This is a working session, not a pitch. Here is what you get.

steps.title: Live Audit on a Real Account
steps.text: Brent walks through 5 audit gaps on an anonymized commerce site. You see exactly what we look for, where it lives in Mailchimp, and how to fix it.

steps.title: The Mailchimp Tool Map
steps.text: A Mailchimp partner expert shows which features close each gap. Segmentation, automation, lifecycle. What your tier already includes and what unlocks the rest.

steps.title: Your Free Email Audit
steps.text: Every registrant gets a free audit on their own program. Submit your last 3 campaigns, copy doc, and historical stats. We deliver a one-pager within 7 days.

steps.title: The Audit Framework PDF
steps.text: A printable 5-gap audit checklist you can rerun every quarter. Free to every registrant, whether you attend live or watch the recording.

data.title: Content Cucumber + Mailchimp. One Workshop.
paragraphs: Brent Peterson is the owner of Content Cucumber, a human-powered marketing company specializing in commerce content and email programs. Brent hosts the Talk Commerce podcast and writes The Agentic Commerce Guy newsletter on AI in commerce.
A Mailchimp partner expert co-hosts the workshop. Segmentation, automation, lifecycle. Every audit gap mapped to the platform features that close it.

items.question: When is the workshop?
items.answer: June 17, 2026 at 11:00 AM Eastern. The session runs 45 minutes. 5 minutes hook, 25 minutes live audit walkthrough across 5 gaps, 5 minutes social proof, 10 minutes Q&A.

items.question: Is this free?
items.answer: Yes. Register and attend live, or watch the recording afterward. Every registrant receives a free email audit delivered within 7 days, whether or not you attend.

items.question: Who is this for?
items.answer: Commerce companies doing $1M to $25M per year using email as a customer channel. Mailchimp Standard, Essentials, and Premium customers benefit most. The audit framework applies regardless of your platform.

items.question: Will there be a recording?
items.answer: Yes. Every registrant receives the recording. We recommend attending live for the Q&A and to submit your audit early.

items.question: How does the free audit work?
items.answer: After registering, you get an audit intake form. Submit your last 3 campaigns, copy doc, and historical stats. We deliver a one-pager within 7 days. No obligation.

items.question: I'm not on Mailchimp. Is this still relevant?
items.answer: The audit framework works regardless of your email platform. The Mailchimp-specific portion shows what good tooling looks like if you are evaluating options.

data.title: Audit Your Email Program. Live.
data.text: Register for the free workshop on June 17. Bring your last 3 campaigns. Walk away with a 5-gap audit framework, the Mailchimp tool map, and a personalized audit delivered within 7 days.
